2026-04-20.patch_summary: This patch adds support for passthrough lookups in the FUSE file system. When a backing ID is set, it associates the fuse inode with the backing inode to be used for passthrough operations. If no backing ID is set, it caches statx attributes from the reply. The patch modifies several functions in fs/fuse/dir.c to use the new/extended struct fuse_entry2_out for lookups and handle both cases.
